title: Informed Enforcement: Lessons from Pollution Monitoring in China
notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. CS-NT CIs 7x wider than TWFE — structural: can't absorb industry×time + province×time FEs (Pattern 50). Tested: ind dummies (531) in xformla → overfitting (ATT=0); prov dummies (21) → SE worse. Point estimates agree (TWFE=0.0033, CS=0.0026). CS-NYT not applicable (single timing). Axbard & Deng (2023). Table 1a Col 1. Stata: reghdfe any_air c.min_dist_10#c.post1 if min_dist<50 & starty<=2010, absorb(time id industry#time prov_id#time) cluster(city_id). Treatment = firm within 10km of air monitor (min_dist_10) x post-2015 (post1). Single treatment date: Q1 2015 (time=21). 36103 firms (after filter), 32 quarters (2010-2017). Outcome: any air enforcement action (0/1). FE: firm + time + industry*time + province*time. Cluster: city_id (171 cities). SA disabled (single treatment). CS-NYT disabled (single treatment). No controls in baseline. Large panel (1.15M obs), may be slow. Original paper also uses Conley spatial HAC SEs. | AUDIT 2026-04-19: Paper-auditor EXACT (0.86%). 0 controls → no Spec A/B/C. Point estimates agree in direction (TWFE 0.0033 vs CS-NT 0.0026). SE 7× inflation is STRUCTURAL PATTERN 50 (CS-NT can't absorb industry×time + province×time FEs that TWFE uses). HonestDiD D-FRAGILE Mbar=0.25 is design signal. LOW rating reflects SE inflation from FE-structure limitations of CS-DID (not implementation), not a fidelity issue.
